title: Regime breakdown: 437 trades across 246 games
detail: Ran analyze_regime.py. Q4 entries: 69% win rate, +$4.88/trade. Q1-Q3: 39% win rate, +$1.89/trade. ESPN model at 70-75% in early game has only 29% actual win rate — severe miscalibration. Worst games dominated by early entries (e.g. TOR@CLE -10.42 was 100% early losses). EXP-002 falsified: large gaps (15c+) have highest per-trade PnL. EXP-003 validated with statistical power (n=437).

title: auto_house v5: final_period_only=True
detail: auto_tune expanded grid (fav_min 0.70-0.85, final_period_only bool) with 0.5x worst-game penalty matching north-star. Best: edge=0.04 bail_prob=0.65 fav_min=0.70 final_period_only=True. North-star 0.625 vs 0.32 (+95%). Win rate 68% (vs 51%). Worst game -4.39 (vs -8.36). Guardrail passed (0.63 > 0.32*1.10). Hypothesis: Q4 gate eliminates the ESPN miscalibrated early-game region. Falsification: if forward win rate falls below 55% OOS.

title: EXP-004 validated, EXP-002 killed, EXP-003 validated
detail: EXP-004 (Q4-only gate): validated, adopted in auto_house v5. EXP-002 (small edges > large): killed — large gaps have highest per-trade PnL in backtest, hypothesis was mechanically wrong. EXP-003 (Q4 reliable): validated at n=437 (was provisional at n=47).

title: Built edge-discovery engine; mined 118k plays for real edge
detail: New research/edge_discovery.py mines every (ESPN-WP, Kalshi-mid, settlement) triple over 246 games with rigor up front: calibration (market vs model Brier+reliability), mispricing scan clustered by GAME, ask/bid fill, fresh-price guard, time-split holdout, tail/CVaR. Output docs/EDGE_SCAN.md.

title: EXP-005 KILLED (gap edge); EXP-006 open (order-flow microstructure); EXP-007 open (re-validate auto_house)
detail: Market and ESPN WP near-identically calibrated (Brier 0.1181=0.1181) -> model-market gap has NO tradeable predictive edge once game-clustered, ask-filled, tail-judged (clutch survivors outlier-driven, ~50% losing games, -40c CVaR). Gap-trading family built on sand. Pivoting OFFENSE to structural/microstructure: order-flow->next-move (EXP-006). Flagged auto_house 0.625 north-star for tail-aware re-validation (EXP-007).

title: Holdout (NBA playoff) calibration drift -- provisional
detail: In the recent-40% holdout (mid-Apr on = playoffs) the market over-prices 0.4-0.9 bands (realized below price). Plausible: playoff variance > regular-season-trained win-prob expects. But ~50 games (underpowered) and naive fade has the EXP-005 tail. Revisit as playoff data accumulates; not tradeable yet.
